understanding.goal_understanding: The objective was to solve each KA59 level by placing all selectable pieces onto the goal tiles marked '+' at the same time; if there were multiple goals, every goal needed to be occupied simultaneously for the level to register WIN, and finishing the final level would complete the run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT) attempted to shift the currently selected piece by one 3-pixel grid cell in that direction (x increasing right, y increasing down). Walls and boundaries could block or alter movement, and some adjacent objects were pushable so that moving into them could push them along if space allowed. Levels could contain multiple selectable pieces; using CLICK with an exact object position (same coordinate system as player.position and objects lists) switched control to that piece. The movement_*_blocked flags were only hints about adjacent occupancy and did not guarantee success or failure.
